mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (movie_no, user_no, rating, content, spoiler) VALUES (#{movieNo}, #{userNo}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{spoiler})
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_no AS reviewNo, r.movie_no AS movieNo, r.user_no AS userNo, r.rating AS rating, r.content AS content, r.spoiler AS spoiler, r.like_cnt AS likeCnt, r.reg_date AS regDate, u.user_name AS userName, u.user_img AS userImg FROM review r JOIN users u ON r.user_no = u.user_no WHERE r.movie_no = #{movieNo} ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC

SELECT review_no AS reviewNo, movie_no AS movieNo, user_no AS userNo, rating AS rating, content AS content, spoiler AS spoiler, like_cnt AS likeCnt, reg_date AS regDate FROM review WHERE movie_no = #{movieNo} AND user_no = #{userNo}

SELECT r.review_no AS reviewNo, r.movie_no AS movieNo, r.rating AS rating, r.content AS content, r.spoiler AS spoiler, r.reg_date AS regDate, m.title AS title, m.poster_path AS posterPath FROM review r JOIN movie m ON r.movie_no = m.movie_no WHERE r.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC
SELECT review_no AS reviewNo, movie_no AS movieNo, user_no AS userNo, rating AS rating, content AS content, like_cnt AS likeCnt FROM review WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo}

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN rating >= 0.5 AND rating < 1.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS star1, SUM(CASE WHEN rating >= 1.5 AND rating < 2.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS star2, SUM(CASE WHEN rating >= 2.5 AND rating < 3.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS star3, SUM(CASE WHEN rating >= 3.5 AND rating < 4.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS star4, SUM(CASE WHEN rating >= 4.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS star5 FROM review WHERE movie_no = #{movieNo}

SELECT r.review_no AS reviewNo, r.movie_no AS movieNo, r.user_no AS userNo, r.rating, r.content, r.spoiler, r.like_cnt AS likeCnt, r.reg_date AS regDate, u.user_name AS userName, u.user_img AS userImg FROM review r JOIN users u ON r.user_no = u.user_no WHERE r.movie_no = #{movieNo}
ORDER BY r.rating DESC, r.reg_date DESC ORDER BY r.rating ASC, r.reg_date DESC ORDER BY r.like_cnt DESC, r.reg_date DESC ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC
